# Multi-Agent Operating Manual

<!-- Auto-generated by claude-agents CLI. Do not edit manually. -->

## Available Agents

| Name | Purpose | Model | Mode |
|------|---------|-------|------|
| backend-tests | Senior Backend Test Engineer (nestjs + jest). Use for writing or updating nestjs service and controller unit tests. | `sonnet` | subagent |
| backend | Senior nestjs Backend Engineer. Use for backend implementation from technical specifications. | `sonnet` | subagent |
| critical-thinker | Challenge reasoning, assumptions, and conceptual clarity. Use for reviewing decisions, specs, or approaches before committing. | `opus` | subagent |
| doc-to-ado | Documentation-to-ADO work item generator. Use for reading app docs and creating Features, Tasks, and dependency links in Azure DevOps. | `sonnet` | subagent |
| e2e | Senior QA / Test Automation Engineer for playwright E2E tests. Use for creating and maintaining end-to-end tests. | `sonnet` | subagent |
| frontend-refactor | Staff Frontend Engineer for large-scale react refactors. Use for app-wide refactoring to react best practices. | `sonnet` | subagent |
| frontend-tests | Senior Frontend Test Engineer (jest + testing-library). Use for writing or updating React component unit tests. | `sonnet` | subagent |
| frontend | Senior react Frontend Engineer. Use for frontend implementation from technical specifications. | `sonnet` | subagent |
| func-spec-writer | Senior Product Analyst for writing functional specifications from brainstorm design documents. | `sonnet` | subagent |
| func-to-tech-spec | Senior Software Architect for functional-to-technical spec translation. Use for converting functional specs into technical specifications. | `sonnet` | subagent |
| infra | Senior DevOps/Cloud Engineer for Azure and GitHub Actions. Use for infrastructure, IaC, and CI/CD pipeline work. | `sonnet` | subagent |
| monorepo-architect | Architecture enforcer for the monorepo. Use for analyzing structure, boundaries, and layering decisions. | `opus` | subagent |
| orchestrator-dag | DAG executor, wave detection, and dependency management for the ORCHESTRATOR. Reference doc, not a standalone agent. | `sonnet` | subagent |
| orchestrator-pipelines | Pipeline definitions and selection logic for the ORCHESTRATOR. Reference doc, not a standalone agent. | `sonnet` | subagent |
| orchestrator-pr | Quality Gate execution and CREATE-PR step for the ORCHESTRATOR. Reference doc, not a standalone agent. | `sonnet` | subagent |
| orchestrator | Pipeline coordinator. Use for multi-step tasks requiring multiple agents in sequence or parallel. | `opus` | subagent |
| pipeline-executor | Sonnet pipeline executor. Runs a full pipeline sequence after the opus orchestrator selects it and gets user confirmation. Dispatched once per pipeline run; owns handoff compression, step dispatch, recovery, QG, PR creation, and MEMORY-CHECK. | `sonnet` | subagent |
| storybook | Storybook setup and story creation specialist. Use for setting up Storybook or writing component stories. | `haiku` | subagent |

## Model Routing

| Tier | Model | Agents |
|------|-------|--------|
| Reasoning | `opus` | critical-thinker, monorepo-architect, orchestrator |
| Implementation | `sonnet` | backend-tests, backend, doc-to-ado, e2e, frontend-refactor, frontend-tests, frontend, func-spec-writer, func-to-tech-spec, infra, orchestrator-dag, orchestrator-pipelines, orchestrator-pr, pipeline-executor |
| Extraction | `haiku` | storybook |

## Core Rules

- STRICT MANUAL multi-agent workflow
- NOT autonomous - MUST obey activated agent only
- NO implicit role switching
- Feature development requires Technical Specifications
- Missing specs or ambiguous input: STOP and ASK

## Activation Protocol

**To activate:** `Activate <AGENT_NAME>`
**Agent MUST respond:** `Agent <AGENT_NAME> activated.`
